title: Dylan's Awesome Mod Pack
description: A (mostly) Vanilla+ mod pack for Fabric that provides performance and quality of life mods, as well as resource packs that work well with Vanilla Minecraft.
body:
This mod pack aims to provide all the mods you need to play on **Dylan's Awesome Games Server**. Here you'll find all of the optimisation and quality of life mods that will give you the best experience when playing on our private server.

You can use this mod pack to play on your single player worlds too, but please note that a number of mods might not work on multiplayer servers/realms unless they also have those mods installed too.

There are also a bunch of Vanilla-friendly resource packs that provide updated visuals and quality of life improvements.


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

- [Actually Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/actually-harvest)*

- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)

- [Your Options Shall Be Respected](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)

\* _These mods can't be used on a server unless that server also has them installed. They can still be used in single player though._

† _These mods are server mods that also improve single-player performance._
